global_shell.mobile_wrapper: w-full max-w-md bg-[#050505] min-h-screen relative overflow-x-hidden shadow-2xl flex flex-col font-manrope text-white pb-24

header_area.wrapper: sticky top-0 z-50 px-4 pt-6 pb-4 flex flex-col gap-4 backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#050505]/80 border-b border-white/5

top_row.location_dropdown: flex items-center gap-1 text-sm font-medium text-gray-300 hover:text-white transition-colors cursor-pointer
top_row.notification_bell: relative p-2 rounded-full bg-[#121212] border border-white/5 text-white

greeting_row.headline: font-outfit text-2xl sm:text-3xl font-bold tracking-tight text-white

search_bar.input_container: flex-1 bg-[#121212] border border-white/10 rounded-2xl px-4 py-3 flex items-center gap-3 transition-colors focus-within:border-[#CCFF00]/50
search_bar.input: bg-transparent border-none text-sm w-full text-white placeholder-gray-500 focus:outline-none focus:ring-0
search_bar.filter_button: p-3 bg-[#121212] border border-white/10 rounded-2xl text-white hover:border-[#CCFF00]/50 hover:text-[#CCFF00] transition-all flex items-center justify-center

promo_carousel.scroll_container: flex overflow-x-auto snap-x snap-mandatory no-scrollbar px-4 gap-4 pb-4 pt-2
promo_carousel.card: min-w-[280px] w-[85%] h-48 rounded-3xl relative overflow-hidden snap-center shrink-0 border border-white/10 flex items-end p-5
promo_carousel.overlay: absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-t from-[#050505] via-[#050505]/40 to-transparent z-10
promo_carousel.content_wrapper: relative z-20 flex flex-col gap-2 w-full
promo_carousel.badge: px-2.5 py-1 bg-[#CCFF00] text-black text-[10px] font-bold uppercase rounded-full self-start tracking-wider font-outfit
promo_carousel.title: font-outfit font-bold text-xl leading-tight text-white
promo_carousel.action: flex items-center gap-1 text-sm font-semibold text-[#CCFF00]

category_navigation.wrapper: px-4 py-2 overflow-x-auto no-scrollbar flex gap-2.5 items-center
category_navigation.chip_active: px-4 py-2.5 rounded-2xl border border-[#CCFF00] bg-[#CCFF00]/10 text-[#CCFF00] font-semibold text-sm whitespace-nowrap transition-all
category_navigation.chip_inactive: px-4 py-2.5 rounded-2xl border border-white/10 bg-[#121212] text-gray-400 font-medium text-sm whitespace-nowrap hover:bg-white/5 transition-all

item_card.container: group bg-[#121212] rounded-3xl border border-white/5 relative overflow-hidden flex flex-col cursor-pointer transition-all duration-300 hover:border-white/15
item_card.image: w-full h-full object-cover transition-transform duration-500 group-hover:scale-105

status_badge.wrapper: absolute top-2 left-2 px-2 py-1 text-[10px] font-bold uppercase rounded-full tracking-wider z-10 backdrop-blur-md

item_card.heart_button: absolute top-2 right-2 p-1.5 rounded-full bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/10 text-white hover:text-red-500 hover:bg-black/60 transition-colors z-10
item_card.title: font-manrope font-semibold text-sm text-white truncate
item_card.location_row: flex items-center gap-1 text-[11px] text-gray-400 font-medium mt-0.5

micro_interactions.search_typing: Use a simple React interval to cycle through placeholders: 'Search textbooks...', 'Search scooters...', 'Search dorm gear...'
micro_interactions.filter_modal_entry: Slide up from bottom (framer-motion or CSS transform)

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the home tab specifically for a mobile-first constraint (max-w-md centered on desktop).
Use exact Tailwind classes provided in the layout_blueprint and components sections to maintain the #050505 obsidian and #CCFF00 volt green aesthetic.
Implement the masonry/bento grid logic by spanning the first item to col-span-2 with a taller height, while subsequent items sit in a standard 2-column grid.
Ensure all data-testids from testing_attributes are added directly to the interactive elements for automated testing.
Do NOT change the color hex codes or fonts (Outfit, Manrope).
Populate the UI with the image URLs provided in the media section to avoid placeholders.
